task_description: Fix two critical bugs (black page on menu click, line jumping on header click) and add 116 new customization settings across 6 areas: Header Layout & Structure (14), Hover Effects (15), Navigation & Typography (17), Mobile & Polish (15), Mega Menu Dropdown Styles + Open Behavior (35), and Badge Colors & Spacing (20). Priority order: bugs first, then mega menu behavior, then remaining settings.

verification.summary: All JSON schemas parse correctly. Header: 75 settings, Mega-nav: 132 settings (207 total). All 64 range settings have valid step-aligned defaults. All CSS files balanced (mega-nav: 219, header: 154). All JS files balanced (mega-nav: 91, header: 36). Key CSS patterns verified: height-grow, stagger, overlay, curtain-reveal, grow-from-dot, slide-bounce, badge animations (pulse/bounce/shine), separators, spacing vars. Code review fixes applied: transform conflict, overlay stacking, close animation, column separators, heading underline, scroll performance, style-attribute selectors, contained/boxed differentiation.
